productDisplayName: Fila Men's Triple Colour Piq Polo Black Navy White T-Shirt
description: CompositionBlack pique polo neck t-shirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, with alternating double stripes of blue and white, a ribbed white tipped collar, front buttoned placket, short sleeves with ribbed hem and white tipping, embroidered branding on left chest and a vented hem and a brand badge on the leftFitRegularWash care Machine wash cold Warm iron Do not tumble dry Do not bleach Wash dark colours separately Dry in shade Do not iron on print A great casual wear, this polo neck t-shirt from fila is designed for those who are young at heart. Created using a cotton and polyester blend fabric, this tee is designed to keep you fresh and comfortable all day, while the ribbed sleeve hem sits snug on well-toned arms. Team this T-shirt with jeans, stylishly buckled belts and sports shoes for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
